text: I love spending time with my friends from different cultures. We learn so much from each other.
Those people from that country are all criminals and should be deported immediately.
The weather is beautiful today. Perfect for a walk in the park.
Women don't belong in leadership positions. They're too emotional to make important decisions.
I respect everyone's right to practice their own religion freely.
People of that faith are all terrorists and a threat to our society.
The new restaurant downtown has amazing food. You should try it!
Those people with disabilities are a burden on society and shouldn't be allowed in public spaces.
I believe in equal rights and opportunities for everyone regardless of who they are.
Those people are disgusting freaks and should be banned from our schools.
